title: Drodi's Blazes x Fresh Animations
description: Makes Drodi's Blazes compatible with Fresh Animations!
body:
# Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

**Drodi's Blazes** revamps the Blaze with a fresh texture & model. Additionally, the pack introduces a rare Wildfire variant, inspired by the one from Minecraft Dungeons.

**Fresh Animations** by Fresh LX is a work in progress resource pack that gives an animation overhaul to the creatures in the default look of Minecraft. 

**Drodi's Blazes x Fresh Animations** makes the two resource pack compatible. After installing both resource packs, make sure their load order matches the screenshot below: Drodi's Blazes x Fresh Animations **above** Fresh Animations.

![appropriate load order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e18de572d4a81416183e8e226da4058ac4732fec.png)

<details>
<summary>Official sources</summary>
The only official versions of my resource packs are available on:

> Curseforge: [**Dordinatteur**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dordinatteur/projects)
> 
> Modrinth: [**Drodi**](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi)
> 
> Planet Minecraft: [**Drodi**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/)

Any other website may host unauthorized reuploads, which could contain viruses or malware. If you choose to download from unofficial sources, you do so at your own risk.

If you suspect that someone is reuploading my resource packs without permission and action can be taken, please contact me on Discord: drodi99.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

- [_Ewan_](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/ewanhowell5195/) : let me use his wildfire animations from his [**Mob Vote**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/mob-vote/) ressource pack.
- [_Fresh LX_](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) : Owner of [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
